pages.text:
بسم النه ترح الرجيم

MINISTER OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

REPUBLIC OF MALDIVES

23 October 2007

Dear Excellency,

I have the honour to advise you that the Republic of Maldives has decided to

become a member of the Office international des épizooties.

The Government of the Republic of Maldives has examined the provisos of

the International Agreement and of the Organic Statutes of 25 January 1924 and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regard to Article 3 of the International Agreement and Article 11 of the Internal Statutes.

The sixth contribution category has been selected by my Government.

The official Delegate of the Government of the Republic of Maldives to the

OIE will be Mr. Mohamed Zuhair, Deputy Minister, Ministry of Fisheries, Agriculture and Marine Resources of the Republic of Maldives.

Please accept, Excellency, the assurances of my highest consideration.

Yours faithfully,

Modula an

Abdulla Shahid

His Excellency Mr. Bernard Kouchner

Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France

Director Générale des Affaires politique et the sécurit é

Direction des National Unies et des Oraganisations Interantionales 37, quai d' Orsay

FRANCE

cc. Director General, OIE
